## **2.2.2.H. PI #8**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

The ANSP has engaged its largest customers on their Continuous Climb Operations (CCO) performance at Irish airports where it provides ATM services. The rate of CCO largely depends on the agreed levels at which an aircraft may be handed over to the neighbouring FIR and the ANSP will continue to work with its counterparts to agree levels which allow departing aircraft to climb at their optimum rate without levelling off.
